description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a textured dark gray fabric. The sofa features two large, square backrest cushions and two matching seat cushions, all of which appear to be firmly attached and uniformly sized. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend to the same height as the seat cushions, giving the sofa a boxy, geometric profile. The base of the sofa is low to the ground and supported by four short, block-style legs, likely made of wood and finished in a dark color. The upholstery has a subtle woven texture, adding visual interest without any visible decorative stitching or tufting. This piece is suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, boxy sofa with dark gray textured upholstery, broad straight armrests, and two large seat and back cushions. Supported by four short, dark block legs, it has a minimalist and sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, square back and seat cushions, broad armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the solid, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, square seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all attached and uniform in size, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at seat height, rectangular profile, no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, dark finish, likely wood, slightly recessed under the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest composed of two large, square, attached cushions, continuous and unsegmented.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
